# Account Payment Order Lock Draft

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:0b5c023898bdded14eec140afbba48b01282e43ac47e387642d3ec73ea857004
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }} {{ badge3 }} {{ badge4 }} {{ badge5 }}

This module adds functionality that prevents invoices from being reset to the draft status if they are linked to a Payment Order that is in progress.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

methods.name: odoo.addons.account_payment_order_lock_draft.models.account_move.AccountMove.button_draft
documentation:
Handles the action of resetting entries to draft status.

Performs the operation of resetting entries to draft status. It iterates
through each entry, verifies if any associated payment order, and raises a UserError if so, preventing the reset operation.

Raises:
    UserError: If an entry is associated with a Payment Order

documentation:
Test if UserError is raised when trying to revert an invoice to draft
status while it's associated with a Payment Order.
